title: Positive flow: Navigating through the menu
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Verify that the 'Edit menu items' screen is displayed.
expected_result: The 'Edit menu items' screen is displayed. | The subtitle 'News' is visible.

title: Positive flow: Selecting a news source
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Scroll through the list of news sources and select 'Reuters'. | Verify that 'Reuters' is highlighted in yellow.
expected_result: The 'Reuters' entry is highlighted in yellow.

title: Negative flow: Attempting to select a non-existent news source
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Scroll through the list of news sources and attempt to select a non-existent news source. | Verify that the app does not crash or display an error message.
expected_result: The app does not crash or display an error message.

title: Negative flow: Removing a selected news source
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Select 'Reuters' from the list of news sources. | Click on 'Reuters' again to remove it from the list. | Verify that 'Reuters' is no longer highlighted in yellow.
expected_result: The 'Reuters' entry is no longer highlighted in yellow.

title: Functional flow: Adding a news source
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Scroll through the list of news sources and select a news source that is not already in the list. | Verify that the new news source is added to the list.
expected_result: The new news source is added to the list.

title: Functional flow: Changing the order of news sources
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Select 'Reuters' from the list of news sources. | Drag and drop 'Reuters' to a different position in the list. | Verify that 'Reuters' is in the new position in the list.
expected_result: The 'Reuters' entry is in the new position in the list.

title: Usability flow: Searching for a news source
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the menu screen. | Click on the menu icon in the header. | Click on the search icon in the header. | Type 'CNN' in the search bar. | Verify that the list of news sources is filtered to show only 'CNN'.
expected_result: The list of news sources is filtered to show only 'CNN'.
